result.name: Coil of endless rope
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Coil of rope Effect: The coil of rope can be let out at a rate of 50 feet (15 m) per round; however, no end to the rope can be found no matter how long the user uncoils it. The rope retains its incredible length until recoiled or until it becomes depleted. If cut, any length beyond the coil’s initial 50 feet crumbles into powder after a round or two. Depletion: 1 in 1d20 (check each use that extends it beyond 50 feet [15 m])
